title: notelaea nervosa
intro: Notelaea nervosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Black Acacia or Black Acacia vine. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds. Notelaea nervosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
